title: (flake) RHEL 9.6 aarch64 local-root system test: `not ok 39 |030| podman run --timeout - basic test`
body:
### Issue Description

```
not ok 39 |030| podman run --timeout - basic test in 7991ms
# tags: ci:parallel
# (from function `bail-now' in file test/system/helpers.bash, line 197,
#  from function `assert' in file test/system/helpers.bash, line 1096,
#  in test file test/system/030-run.bats, line 866)
#   `assert "$delta_t" -le 6 "podman stop: took too long"' failed
#
# [01:48:52.843547440] # /var/ARTIFACTS/work-root-local2nu1vhpi/plans/system/root-local/tree/bin/podman run --name c_t39-mksxvy9v --timeout 2 quay.io/libpod/testimage:20241011 sleep 60
# [01:48:59.887547487] [ rc=255 (expected) ]
#
# [01:48:59.900773356] # /var/ARTIFACTS/work-root-local2nu1vhpi/plans/system/root-local/tree/bin/podman inspect --format {{.State.Status}} {{.State.ExitCode}} c_t39-mksxvy9v
# [01:49:00.044404083] exited -1
# #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
# #|     FAIL: podman stop: took too long
# #| expected: -le 6
# #|   actual:     7
# #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
# # [teardown]
```
seen at: https://artifacts.osci.redhat.com/testing-farm/e9755883-31d6-4db7-92d3-647040e1b048/
